mapper.select: SELECT pa.*, u.full_name AS user_name, a.full_name AS adjusted_by_name FROM points_adjustments pa JOIN users u ON pa.user_id = u.id JOIN users a ON pa.adjusted_by = a.id WHERE pa.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY pa.created_at DESC
SELECT pa.*, u.full_name AS user_name, a.full_name AS adjusted_by_name FROM points_adjustments pa JOIN users u ON pa.user_id = u.id JOIN users a ON pa.adjusted_by = a.id ORDER BY pa.created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO points_adjustments (user_id, adjusted_by, points, reason, balance_before, balance_after) VALUES (#{userId}, #{adjustedBy}, #{points}, #{reason}, #{balanceBefore}, #{balanceAfter})
